symbols: church tower — the enduring presence of the Church amid urban life
description: A painting of a stone church with a tall Romanesque bell tower, viewed from a nearby street. The church facade is rendered in warm grays and yellows. Surrounding buildings line the street, and a few small figures walk in the square before the church. The sky is pale with light clouds. The style is characteristic of Utrillo's urban landscapes, with simplified forms and a quiet, melancholic palette.
